g.onclick: sendPrompt('When should I add supporting files to a skill?')
sendPrompt('How do I reference example files from a skill?')
sendPrompt('How does Claude execute scripts bundled with a skill?')

svg.text: Keep SKILL.md under 500 lines · move detail to supporting files

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the rules for naming a skill?')
sendPrompt('How does Claude use the skill description?')

svg.text: When to use the skill · truncated at 250 chars in listing
true → only user can invoke · description hidden from Claude

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is user-invocable: false used for?')

svg.text: false → hidden from / menu · Claude still invokes it

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does context: fork do in a skill?')

svg.text: fork → runs in isolated subagent · no conversation history

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does allowed-tools restrict Claude in a skill?')

svg.text: Tools usable without per-call approval when skill is active

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do paths glob patterns work in skill frontmatter?')

svg.text: Glob patterns · skill only auto-loads for matching files

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are enterprise skills deployed in Claude Code?')
sendPrompt('How do plugin skills avoid naming conflicts?')
